title: Thanksgiving Will Cost More This Year. That Could Cost Democrats, Too.
content: Rising prices for gas and a holiday meal could come back to bite Democrats, who fear that inflation may upend their electoral prospects in the 2022 midterms.
en_title: Thanksgiving Will Cost More This Year. That Could Cost Democrats, Too.
en_content: Rising prices for gas and a holiday meal could come back to bite Democrats, who fear that inflation may upend their electoral prospects in the 2022 midterms.

title: How the U.S. Lost Ground to China in the Contest for Clean Energy
content: Americans failed to safeguard decades of diplomatic and financial investments in Congo, where the world’s largest supply of cobalt is controlled by Chinese companies backed by Beijing.

more_info.byline: By Eric Lipton, Dionne Searcey and Ashley Gilbertson

en_title: How the U.S. Lost Ground to China in the Contest for Clean Energy
en_content: Americans failed to safeguard decades of diplomatic and financial investments in Congo, where the world’s largest supply of cobalt is controlled by Chinese companies backed by Beijing.

title: G.O.P. Donors Back Manchin and Sinema as They Reshape Biden’s Agenda
content: The two Democratic senators are attracting campaign contributions from business interests and conservatives as progressives fume over their efforts to pare back the president’s domestic policy bill.

more_info.byline: By Kenneth P. Vogel and Kate Kelly

en_title: G.O.P. Donors Back Manchin and Sinema as They Reshape Biden’s Agenda
en_content: The two Democratic senators are attracting campaign contributions from business interests and conservatives as progressives fume over their efforts to pare back the president’s domestic policy bill.

title: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez on Why Democrats’ ‘Talking Points Are Not Enough’
content: The House progressive spoke about “demoralizing” congressional negotiations, how she was told to stay away from Virginia’s elections, and what it means to excite the Democratic base.
en_title: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez on Why Democrats’ ‘Talking Points Are Not Enough’
en_content: The House progressive spoke about “demoralizing” congressional negotiations, how she was told to stay away from Virginia’s elections, and what it means to excite the Democratic base.

title: With Back Channels to Manchin and Sinema, Pelosi Found a Path to a Deal
content: The House’s approval of a sweeping social policy bill after weeks of fits and starts notched another win for the speaker in a career defined by them.
en_title: With Back Channels to Manchin and Sinema, Pelosi Found a Path to a Deal
en_content: The House’s approval of a sweeping social policy bill after weeks of fits and starts notched another win for the speaker in a career defined by them.

title: G.O.P. Is Energized, but ‘Trump Cancel Culture’ Poses a Threat
content: The former president, tightening his grip on the party as a haphazard kingmaker, threatens Republican incumbents and endorses questionable candidates.

more_info.byline: By Jonathan Martin and Shane Goldmacher

en_title: G.O.P. Is Energized, but ‘Trump Cancel Culture’ Poses a Threat
en_content: The former president, tightening his grip on the party as a haphazard kingmaker, threatens Republican incumbents and endorses questionable candidates.

title: U.S. Tries to Convince Arab Allies It Isn’t Abandoning Them
content: The defense secretary faced tough questions about how countries were supposed to deal with a U.S. national security policy that upends itself with each president.

title: Race to the Future: What to Know About the Frantic Quest for Cobalt
content: A New York Times investigation examines the global demand for raw materials as the clean energy revolution takes off. This is what we found.

en_title: Race to the Future: What to Know About the Frantic Quest for Cobalt

title: A Power Struggle Over Cobalt Rattles the Clean Energy Revolution
content: The quest for Congo’s cobalt, which is vital for electric vehicles and the worldwide push against climate change, is caught in an international cycle of exploitation, greed and gamesmanship.

more_info.byline: By Dionne Searcey, Michael Forsythe, Eric Lipton and Ashley Gilbertson

en_title: A Power Struggle Over Cobalt Rattles the Clean Energy Revolution
en_content: The quest for Congo’s cobalt, which is vital for electric vehicles and the worldwide push against climate change, is caught in an international cycle of exploitation, greed and gamesmanship.

title: Family Unvisited, Travel a No-Go: The Hard Costs of High Gas Prices
content: They hit their highest level since 2014 last month, forcing Americans to rejigger household budgets and forgo leisure activities.

more_info.byline: By Emma Goldberg, Coral Murphy Marcos and Kellen Browning

en_title: Family Unvisited, Travel a No-Go: The Hard Costs of High Gas Prices
en_content: They hit their highest level since 2014 last month, forcing Americans to rejigger household budgets and forgo leisure activities.

title: When Can the Covid Masks Finally Come Off?
content: Although the end of mask mandates is in sight, restrictions should remain in place through the holidays, experts say.
en_title: When Can the Covid Masks Finally Come Off?
en_content: Although the end of mask mandates is in sight, restrictions should remain in place through the holidays, experts say.

title: How Hunter Biden’s Firm Helped Secure Cobalt for the Chinese
content: The president’s son was part owner of a venture involved in the $3.8 billion purchase by a Chinese conglomerate of one of the world’s largest cobalt deposits. The metal is a key ingredient in batteries for electric vehicles.

more_info.byline: By Michael Forsythe, Eric Lipton and Dionne Searcey

en_title: How Hunter Biden’s Firm Helped Secure Cobalt for the Chinese
en_content: The president’s son was part owner of a venture involved in the $3.8 billion purchase by a Chinese conglomerate of one of the world’s largest cobalt deposits. The metal is a key ingredient in batteries for electric vehicles.

title: How Much Does Biden’s Spending Bill Actually Cost?
content: The climate change and social policy measure that the House just passed includes about $2.2 trillion worth of spending programs and tax cuts. But there are many ways to tally its price tag.
en_title: How Much Does Biden’s Spending Bill Actually Cost?
en_content: The climate change and social policy measure that the House just passed includes about $2.2 trillion worth of spending programs and tax cuts. But there are many ways to tally its price tag.

title: Fact-Checking Kevin McCarthy’s 8-Hour Speech
content: The House Republican leader made a number of false or misleading claims about the social spending bill, President Biden, immigration policy and Teslas.
en_title: Fact-Checking Kevin McCarthy’s 8-Hour Speech
en_content: The House Republican leader made a number of false or misleading claims about the social spending bill, President Biden, immigration policy and Teslas.

title: U.S. Warns Allies of Possible Russian Incursion as Troops Amass Near Ukraine
content: Western intelligence officials are increasingly convinced that the Russian president wants to take control of a larger swath of territory.

org_facet: Office of the Director of National Intelligence

title: What’s in the $2.2 Trillion Social Policy and Climate Bill
content: The package includes $400 billion to bolster support for children and families, $555 billion for climate change programs and $166 billion in housing aid.
en_title: What’s in the $2.2 Trillion Social Policy and Climate Bill
en_content: The package includes $400 billion to bolster support for children and families, $555 billion for climate change programs and $166 billion in housing aid.

title: Boosted, Not Basted: Biden Pardons 2 Turkeys in Thanksgiving Tradition
content: “Peanut Butter and Jelly were selected based on their temperament, appearance, and, I suspect, vaccination status,” the president said.
en_title: Boosted, Not Basted: Biden Pardons 2 Turkeys in Thanksgiving Tradition
en_content: “Peanut Butter and Jelly were selected based on their temperament, appearance, and, I suspect, vaccination status,” the president said.

title: C.D.C. Endorses Covid Vaccine Booster Shots for All Adults
content: As infections rise, Americans over 18 will be permitted to get extra doses. But it’s not clear boosters really are needed by so many people, or that the shots will turn back the pandemic.

org_facet: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention

en_title: C.D.C. Endorses Covid Vaccine Booster Shots for All Adults
en_content: As infections rise, Americans over 18 will be permitted to get extra doses. But it’s not clear boosters really are needed by so many people, or that the shots will turn back the pandemic.

title: Google questions if the new Justice Department antitrust boss can be impartial.
content: Jonathan Kanter, who was confirmed by the Senate earlier this week as the assistant attorney general for antitrust, has been a longtime behind-the-scenes player in building arguments against tech giants.
en_title: Google questions if the new Justice Department antitrust boss can be impartial.
en_content: Jonathan Kanter, who was confirmed by the Senate earlier this week as the assistant attorney general for antitrust, has been a longtime behind-the-scenes player in building arguments against tech giants.

title: Biden Nominates Two New Postal Service Board Members
content: The president moved to replace two members who have been supporters of Postmaster General Louis DeJoy, a step that could portend a shift in leadership at the agency.
en_title: Biden Nominates Two New Postal Service Board Members
en_content: The president moved to replace two members who have been supporters of Postmaster General Louis DeJoy, a step that could portend a shift in leadership at the agency.

title: Rev. W. Sterling Cary, Pioneering Black Churchman, Dies at 94
content: He embraced what became known as Black liberation theology and, in 1972, became the first Black leader of the National Council of Churches.
en_title: Rev. W. Sterling Cary, Pioneering Black Churchman, Dies at 94
en_content: He embraced what became known as Black liberation theology and, in 1972, became the first Black leader of the National Council of Churches.

title: Biden Declared ‘Healthy’ and ‘Vigorous’ After His First Presidential Physical
content: Vice President Kamala Harris became the first woman to assume acting presidential duties, while President Biden underwent a colonoscopy.

title: Painful Changes in Society Eased Passage of Bold Safety Net Measure
content: President Barack Obama barely muscled his health law through the House. But income inequality, economic stagnation and a pandemic propelled an even more ambitious bill.

des_facet: Patient Protection and Affordable Care Act (2010)

en_title: Painful Changes in Society Eased Passage of Bold Safety Net Measure
en_content: President Barack Obama barely muscled his health law through the House. But income inequality, economic stagnation and a pandemic propelled an even more ambitious bill.
